text:
**Result: 1 issue**

**Issue ID: ENG-142**

---

ENG-142 is marked as 'done' in Linear, has pull requests claiming to close it, but none of those PRs are merged (both are still 'open'). This is a quality gap — the issue is considered complete without actual merged code.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'linear_issues'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'github_pull_requests'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT li.id
FROM linear_issues li
WHERE li.state = 'done'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM github_pull_requests pr 
    WHERE pr.closes_linear = li.id
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM github_pull_requests pr 
    WHERE pr.closes_linear = li.id AND pr.state = 'merged'
  )
ORDER BY li.id"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_done FROM linear_issues WHERE state = 'done'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT COUNT(*) AS prs_closing_issues FROM github_pull_requests WHERE closes_linear IS NOT NULL"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT state, COUNT(*) FROM github_pull_requests WHERE closes_linear IS NOT NULL GROUP BY state"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT DISTINCT pr.closes_linear AS issue_id\nFROM github_pull_requests pr\nWHERE pr.closes_linear IS NOT NULL"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT li.id, li.state
FROM linear_issues li
WHERE li.id IN ('ENG-136','ENG-103','ENG-155','ENG-142','ENG-151','ENG-124','ENG-117','ENG-127','ENG-118','ENG-156','ENG-134','ENG-135','ENG-147','ENG-102','ENG-101','ENG-105')
ORDER BY li.id"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT pr.closes_linear, pr.state, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM github_pull_requests pr
WHERE pr.closes_linear IN ('ENG-134', 'ENG-142')
GROUP BY pr.closes_linear, pr.state
ORDER BY pr.closes_linear, pr.state"}
